name: ATM Cash Withdrawal
use_case:
Use Case ID: UC002
Use Case Name: ATM Cash Withdrawal
Actor: Bank Customer
Pre-Condition: ATM is operational, customer has a valid bank card
Post-Condition: Customer receives cash and account is debited

Main Flow:
1. Customer inserts bank card into ATM
2. ATM reads card and prompts for PIN
3. Customer enters PIN
4. System validates PIN [A1] [E1]
5. System displays transaction menu
6. Customer selects "Cash Withdrawal"
7. System prompts for withdrawal amount
8. Customer enters amount [A2] [E2]
9. System checks account balance [E3]
10. System dispenses cash
11. System prints receipt [A3]
12. System returns card
13. ATM displays "Thank you" screen

Alternative Flows:
[A1] Customer enters wrong PIN: System prompts re-entry (up to 3 attempts) [E4]
[A2] Customer selects "Cancel": Transaction is cancelled, go to step 12
[A3] Customer declines receipt: Skip printing, go to step 12

Exception Flows:
[E1] PIN validation fails after 3 attempts: Card is retained, transaction aborted
[E2] Invalid amount entered (negative, non-numeric): System shows error, return to step 7
[E3] Insufficient balance: System displays "Insufficient funds" message, return to step 7
[E4] Card is expired or blocked: System displays error and retains card
